capability_summary: Added explicit seven-room graph/pathing/travel-time behavior, named deterministic scenarios including maintenance_day, scenario JSON serialization/deserialization/validation, and expanded save/load compatibility.
baseline_preservation: Default scenario and CLI baseline coverage remain in tests; milestone reviews confirmed baseline preservation.

validation_summary.pytest: Story evidence reached 18 passing tests; final validation remains required at strategic completion through adeptus_pytest(args=["-q"], timeout_seconds=60).
validation_summary.cleanup: Story and review cleanup removed runtime artifacts; no known cache/temp artifacts remain.
